cycle.title: Study Cycle
cycle.modalHelp: Choose the total time and the default duration of each block.
cycle.subtitle: {total} total · {blocks} blocks of {duration}

completion.firstCycle: Congratulations, you completed your first cycle!

deleteCycle.title: Are you sure you want to delete this cycle?

errors.saveState: Could not save the Pomodoro state.

welcome.title: Welcome to Study Like a Villain
welcome.text: Build study cycles by subject, priority and time. The app organizes your blocks so you only have to execute the plan.

subjects.title: Add your subjects
subjects.text: Register the subjects you need to study. Then choose the priority level of each one: low, medium or high.

priority.title: Priority defines repetition
priority.text: High-priority subjects appear more often in the cycle. Low-priority subjects appear less often.

cycle.title: Configure your cycle
cycle.text: When generating a cycle, choose the name, total study time and duration of each block. You can use blocks of 30 minutes, 1 hour, 1 hour and a half or 2 hours.

timer.title: Study until the timer ends
timer.text: Start the timer and study the current subject. When time runs out, the app automatically completes the block and moves to the next subject.

reorder.title: Pause to reorganize
reorder.text: You can drag future blocks to change the order. If you want to move the current subject, pause the timer first. Recommendation: try to finish the block before switching and take a short break before the next one.

microcopy.noSubjects: Add your first subject to start your cycle.
microcopy.readyToGenerate: Now generate your study cycle. You can choose the total time and block duration in the next step.
microcopy.beforeStart: Drag the blocks to change the order of the subjects.
microcopy.timerRunning: Timer in progress: focus on the current subject until the block ends.
microcopy.timerPaused: Timer paused: you can reorganize the blocks, including the current subject.
